name: Beszel
longDescription:
Beszel is a lightweight server monitoring platform with Docker statistics, historical data, and alerting. It has a friendly web interface, simple configuration, and is ready to use out of the box.

This is the hub (dashboard) container. After deploying, add one lightweight agent container to each machine you want to monitor — including other hosts on your network. Built on PocketBase; supports automatic backup, multi-user, OAuth authentication, and API access.
description: Lightweight server/Docker monitoring hub with web dashboard, history and alerts.
